latestEpisodeTitle: Looking for par'Mach in All the Wrong Places
recentHighlights: Looking for par'Mach in All the Wrong Places (S5E03) — Written by Ronald D. Moore, directed by Andrew Robinson. The Klingon romantic comedy of manners. Worf's VCD puppet courtship, Quark's terrible poetry, O'Brien-Kira's near-crossing. The control architecture that fails and the freedom that enters through the crack.

The Ship (S5E02) — Siege bottle episode. Muniz's death, O'Brien's vigil, Worf's Ak'voh. A dying Founder triggers Jem'Hadar mass suicide. Kilana's devastating final question: 'Do you have any gods, Captain Sisko?'
Apocalypse Rising (S5E01) — Season 5 premiere. The changeling is Martok, not Gowron. Odo chooses his own face. Founders' catalytic misdirection at its finest.
Broken Link (S4E26) — Season 4 finale. Odo's destabilized molecular structure, Founders' engineered illness, permanent solidification. Garak's attempt to destroy the Great Link stopped by Worf.
The Quickening (S4E24) — Auberjonois's directorial debut. Plague-world where hope has been systematically extinguished for 200 years. Bashir's 'cure' fails — but he changes the conditions.
